scale: 1 = lowest coaching priority, 5 = highest. Prefer spine angle and swing path over camera-dependent hip-line and lateral-hip metrics. metricNotes (when present) explain weak or ambiguous measurements.

metricNotes.kinematics.weightShift.lateralHipMovemen: Hip midpoint horizontal shift setup→impact in 2D only—not foot pressure or true weight transfer; do not coach this like a launch-monitor pressure trace.
metricNotes.kinematics.hipTilt.max: Angle of hip–hip line in the image plane, not 3D pelvic tilt; very camera-dependent.
metricNotes.kinematics.hipTilt.impact: Same 2D hip-line proxy as max; use as a weak cue only.
metricNotes.kinematics.hipTilt.top: Pro reference for this key can be sparse (small n); treat bands cautiously.
metricNotes.kinematics.shoulderTilt.top: Pro reference for this key can be sparse (small n); treat bands cautiously.
